title: Hawser (Edge)
description: Dockhand Edge agent — outbound WebSocket, no inbound ports needed

env.name: STACKS_PATH
env.label: Stacks Storage Path (host path or named volume)

note: Deploys Hawser in Edge mode: initiates an outbound WebSocket connection to the central Dockhand server. No inbound ports required — works behind NAT and firewalls.
